sourceAuthority: This file routes open work. Source owners, result receipts, and the evidence-tier contract retain semantic authority.

openQuestions.title: Do relations add causal information?
openQuestions.question: Can a relation-aware model predict an intervention better than a model with the same elements but no explicit relation structure?
openQuestions.nextMilestone: Choose one real system and freeze the element-only rival, relation-aware rival, intervention, outcome, and held-out split.
openQuestions.moves: Local evidence for the D1-to-D2 aperture only.
openQuestions.kill: The relation-aware model adds no held-out discrimination or merely renames information already present in the baseline.

openQuestions.title: Is counterfactual capacity distinct?
openQuestions.question: Does a separately measured capacity to represent alternatives predict action beyond rich reactive, planning, memory, and search baselines?
openQuestions.nextMilestone: Define the D5 variable independently, then compare model-based, model-free, memory, and search controls.
openQuestions.moves: Local evidence for the D4-to-D5 aperture only.
openQuestions.kill: A fair D4 baseline predicts the same behavior without a distinct counterfactual-capacity variable.

openQuestions.title: Which conjunctive model fits?
openQuestions.question: Does the normalized product Phi times V predict held-out outcomes better than additive, minimum, harmonic, CES, and Cobb-Douglas rivals in a frozen domain?
openQuestions.nextMilestone: Freeze the domain, independent factor measures, rival models, exclusions, and held-out outcomes before data contact.
openQuestions.moves: The product wager only in the tested domain.
openQuestions.kill: The product fails to discriminate from simpler or preregistered rival aggregators.

openQuestions.title: Do foresight and means trade off?
openQuestions.question: What measurable budget surface, if any, relates option-model quality, its resource cost, and remaining usable means?
openQuestions.nextMilestone: Compare no-tradeoff, additive, nonlinear, and state-dependent surfaces using independently measured factors.
openQuestions.kill: No stable tradeoff appears, or the selected measurement encodes the desired surface.

openQuestions.title: Do five apertures survive separately?
openQuestions.question: Does each proposed aperture possess an independent novelty discriminator and a lower-register recovery test?
openQuestions.nextMilestone: Run one seam at a time. Do not compute a joint score before every row has its own test.
openQuestions.moves: One crossing at a time, then the five-crossing census.
openQuestions.kill: Rows fail independently, remain permutable, or add no capability beyond their lower-register descriptions.

openQuestions.title: Can a shared trace outlive its carriers?
openQuestions.question: Does a persistent shared trace survive carrier turnover and measurably reweight later choices beyond current incentives and direct coordination?
openQuestions.nextMilestone: Replace carriers and remove or scramble the trace while recording payers, beneficiaries, and substrate costs.
openQuestions.kill: The trace adds no intervention-sensitive predictive value beyond carriers, incentives, or direct coordination.

openQuestions.title: Can represented futures change present choice?
openQuestions.question: Does changing represented future content alter present selection beyond salience, demand, reward framing, memory, and expectancy?
openQuestions.nextMilestone: Preregister a content-specific manipulation with matched negative controls.
openQuestions.kill: Future-content interventions add no value beyond fair present-state and framing controls.

openQuestions.title: Can block plurality be observed?
openQuestions.question: Is there any observation that distinguishes ontic plurality of complete histories from epistemic support over alternatives?
openQuestions.nextMilestone: Produce an interpretation-sensitive observation or publish a non-identifiability result.
openQuestions.kill: No observation can distinguish the ontologies within the declared empirical domain.

openQuestions.title: Can history-bundle growth be measured?
openQuestions.question: Can history entropy be defined independently of Minkowski causal volume, model resolution, and search budget?
openQuestions.nextMilestone: Define and validate the metric before comparing it with cone geometry.
openQuestions.moves: The light-cone and history-bundle correspondence only.
openQuestions.kill: The metric collapses into causal volume, model resolution, or arbitrary search budget.

openQuestions.title: Are force and freedom rows non-permutable?
openQuestions.question: Does each proposed force-affinity row recover its native theory and outperform every permutation on a quantitative discriminator?
openQuestions.nextMilestone: Build one native object map and accepted-domain recovery test per row before attempting a joint correspondence.
openQuestions.moves: Each force-affinity leg independently; joint unification only last.
openQuestions.kill: Rows can be permuted without predictive loss or fail accepted-domain recovery.

openQuestions.title: Does the integrated grammar add anything?
openQuestions.question: Can the complete grammar make one novel frozen prediction with consequence value beyond serious plural-domain rivals?
openQuestions.nextMilestone: Wait until modular measures work, then obtain an external red team, independent replication, and a published null route.
openQuestions.moves: Integrated adequacy, never the native component truths.
openQuestions.kill: The integrated framework adds no prediction, compression, or consequence value beyond its source disciplines.

contributionModes.title: Sponsor bounded compute
contributionModes.description: Fund one declared question through a site-controlled provider project with hard cost, model, tool, retention, and expiry limits.

contributionModes.title: Run a packet locally
contributionModes.description: Use your own provider credentials on your own machine and return only the prompts, outputs, costs, and provenance receipt.

contributionModes.title: Contribute expertise or evidence
contributionModes.description: Strengthen the native account, rival, discriminator, dataset, replication, or contradiction report without funding model inference.
